query:
SELECT 
  projectId,
  COUNT(*) as total_products,
  SUM(CASE WHEN title IS NOT NULL AND title != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_title,
  SUM(CASE WHEN bulletPoints IS NOT NULL AND bulletPoints != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_bulletPoints,
  SUM(CASE WHEN monthlySalesHistory IS NOT NULL AND monthlySalesHistory != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_history,
  SUM(CASE WHEN price IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_price,
  SUM(CASE WHEN bsr IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_bsr,
  SUM(CASE WHEN parentAsin IS NOT NULL AND parentAsin != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_parentAsin,
  SUM(CASE WHEN fbaFee IS NOT NULL AND fbaFee != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_fbaFee,
  SUM(CASE WHEN grossMargin IS NOT NULL AND grossMargin != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_grossMargin
FROM dev_products 
GROUP BY projectId 
ORDER BY projectId DESC 
LIMIT 5;

  COUNT(*) as total_products,
  SUM(CASE WHEN title IS NOT NULL AND title != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_title,
  SUM(CASE WHEN bulletPoints IS NOT NULL AND bulletPoints != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_bulletPoints,
  SUM(CASE WHEN monthlySalesHistory IS NOT NULL AND monthlySalesHistory != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_history,
  SUM(CASE WHEN price IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_price,
  SUM(CASE WHEN bsr IS NOT NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_bsr,
  SUM(CASE WHEN parentAsin IS NOT NULL AND parentAsin != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_parentAsin,
  SUM(CASE WHEN fbaFee IS NOT NULL AND fbaFee != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_fbaFee,
  SUM(CASE WHEN grossMargin IS NOT NULL AND grossMargin != '' THEN 1 ELSE 0 END) as has_grossMargin
FROM dev_products 
GROUP BY projectId 
ORDER BY projectId DESC 
LIMIT 5;
